title: Add SRH for downward mesh-to-mesh in forward_mesh_to_upstream
description: Implement SRH insertion using SourceRoutingHeader and routing_table.lookup for downward paths in mesh-to-mesh case per spec/05-routing.md and RPL non-storing. Integrate in gateway.rs. P2 fix. No comments. Parent project-LICHEN-rmns deps project-LICHEN-1877
